description: Follower of Vaen shares visions and asks party to join the walk
Area where reality thins; Echoed hear voices, Shellbroken feel pulled toward the Gap
Distant glimpse of Vaen; pursuit leads to an abandoned campsite with a message
Merchant assessing Veilward; nervously watching Pilgrimage movements
NPC behaving strangely; carrying a page of the Manuscript; denies knowing what it is
Village of Echoed settled near a resonance thin-point; protective of their space
Orthodoxy agent tracking unregistered enhancements through Veilward
Party arrives at the coast where the Gap is visible; strange compulsion mechanics
Prior-cycle remnant defends the citadel; not fully hostile; bound by ancient oath
Physical evidence of Vaen's passage; interacting reveals the next step of the Pilgrimage
